HERMITMOD-CONCENTRATION_POWER.title: Concentration
HERMITMOD-CONCENTRATION_POWER.descriptio: The next [gold]Dead On[/gold] card you play this turn triggers its effect regardless of position.
HERMITMOD-HIGH_NOON_POWER.title: High Noon
HERMITMOD-HIGH_NOON_POWER.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Strike[/gold] or [gold]Defend[/gold], draw {HighNoonPower:diff()} card(s).
HERMITMOD-FATAL_DESIRE_POWER.title: Fatal Desire
HERMITMOD-FATAL_DESIRE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, draw 2 cards and add an [gold]Injury[/gold] to your hand.
HERMITMOD-SHADOW_CLOAK_POWER.title: Shadow Cloak
HERMITMOD-SHADOW_CLOAK_POWER.description: Whenever you draw or [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a curse, gain {ShadowCloakPower:diff()} Block.
HERMITMOD-TAKE_AIM_POWER.title: Take Aim
HERMITMOD-TAKE_AIM_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Concentrate[/gold].
HERMITMOD-ADAPT_POWER.title: Adapt
HERMITMOD-ADAPT_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] up to {AdaptPower:diff()} card(s) to gain 8 Block each.
HERMITMOD-BRUISE_POWER.title: Bruised
HERMITMOD-BRUISE_POWER.description: This turn, target takes {BruisePower:diff()} more attack damage.
HERMITMOD-HORROR_POWER.title: Horror
HERMITMOD-HORROR_POWER.description: Bruise will not wear off for {HorrorPower:diff()} turn(s).
HERMITMOD-COMBO_POWER.title: Combo
HERMITMOD-COMBO_POWER.description: The first {ComboPower:diff()} [gold]Dead On[/gold] card(s) triggered this turn will be put back into your hand.
HERMITMOD-BIG_SHOT_POWER.title: Smoking Barrel
HERMITMOD-BIG_SHOT_POWER.description: Whenever you activate a [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect, your next attack deals {BigShotPower:diff()} more damage.
HERMITMOD-BRAWL_POWER.title: Brawl
HERMITMOD-BRAWL_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, apply {BrawlPower:diff()} Bruise to ALL enemies.
HERMITMOD-RUGGED_POWER.title: Rugged
HERMITMOD-RUGGED_POWER.description: The next {RuggedPower:diff()} time(s) you would take unblocked attack damage, reduce it to 2.
HERMITMOD-ETERNAL_POWER.title: Power Eternal
HERMITMOD-ETERNAL_POWER.description: The first 4 playable cards drawn at the start of each turn cost {EternalPower:diff()} less that turn.
HERMITMOD-OVERWHELMING_POWER_POWER.title: Overwhelming Power
HERMITMOD-OVERWHELMING_POWER_POWER.descr: Lose {OverwhelmingPowerPower:diff()} HP if you end your turn with 0 Energy.
HERMITMOD-MAINTENANCE_STRIKE_POWER.title: Maintenance
HERMITMOD-DETERMINATION_POWER.title: Determination
HERMITMOD-DETERMINATION_POWER.descriptio: Whenever a debuff is applied to you, gain {DeterminationPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
HERMITMOD-DRAINED_POWER.title: Drained
HERMITMOD-BOUNTY_POWER.title: Bounty
HERMITMOD-SNIPE_POWER.title: Snipe
HERMITMOD-SNIPE_POWER.description: The next {SnipePower:diff()} [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect(s) this turn trigger twice.
HERMITMOD-COALESCENCE_POWER.title: Coalescence
HERMITMOD-COALESCENCE_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] up to {CoalescencePower:diff()} card(s).
HERMITMOD-REPRIEVE_POWER.title: Reprieve
HERMITMOD-REPRIEVE_POWER.description: Take {ReprievePower:diff()} extra turn(s) after this one.
HERMITMOD-PET_GHOST_POWER.title: Pet Ghost
HERMITMOD-PET_GHOST_POWER.description: You cannot die. Die at the end of your next turn.
HERMITMOD-RYE_STALK_POWER.title: Rye Stalk
HERMITMOD-RYE_STALK_POWER.description: At the end of this turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] any number of cards.

HERMITMOD-SNIPER_FOCUS_POWER.title: Sniper Focus
HERMITMOD-SNIPER_FOCUS_POWER.description: Your single-target attacks deal {SniperFocusPower:diff()} additional damage per stack.
HERMITMOD-SNIPER_FOCUS_POWER.smartDescri: Your single-target attacks deal {SniperFocusPower:diff()} additional damage per stack.

HERMITMOD-SPRAY_PATTERN_POWER.descriptio: At the start of your turn, deal {SprayPatternPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
